notableEvents.label: Ryan Waldschmidt reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Waldschmidt reaches on a fielding error by shortstop CJ Abrams. Ildemaro Vargas to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. hits a grand slam (7) to center field. Drew Millas scores. Nasim Nuñez scores. James Wood scores.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead lines out to second baseman Ketel Marte.

notableEvents.label: Dylan Crews plunked
notableEvents.detail: Dylan Crews hit by pitch. Curtis Mead scores. CJ Abrams to 3rd. Jorbit Vivas to 2nd.

notableEvents.detail: Ryan Waldschmidt reaches on a fielding error by shortstop CJ Abrams. Ildemaro Vargas to 3rd.
